title: phreatia subalpina
intro: Phreatia subalpina is a species of orchid that is native to New Guinea. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Phreatia subalpina include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Phreatia subalpina can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
